title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Bank welcomes you to the Winners Club. Now stay one step ahead always in life with your `Winnings' Credit Card. You will always enjoy an edge over your compeer with your intelligently designed 'Winnings' Credit Card. 
With IDBI Bank `Winnings' Credit Card, always enjoy an extra convenience, security, and flexibility wherever you go! 
For further details call Customer Care at 1800-209-4324 (Toll Free) or 022-67719100 (Call Charges Applicable) or visit the nearest IDBI Bank branch. 
The digitized Credit Card Welcome e-Kit is IDBI Bank’s constant endeavor towards the Go Green initiative. This e-Kit provides the cardholder with detailed information regarding Card Usage, Cardholders Agreement and Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC), in a downloadable PDF format. 
The `Winnings' Credit Card always gives you something extra. You will earn 2 Delight Points for every Rs. 100 spent on your card. So shop till you drop with your `Winnings` Credit Card and get irresistible offers from globally renowned brands redeemable against your Delight Points. Additionally, enjoy bonus delight points as following:
  * 500 bonus delight points on first transaction of Rs. 1,000 or more within 30 days of card activation.
  * Additional milestone benefit of 1,000 points on net annual spends of Rs. 1 lakhs.
  * Additional milestone benefit of 1,500 points on net annual spends of Rs. 2 lakhs.


***Delight points would be accrued only on transactions except the ones exempted from delight points accrual. Refer the exempted transaction categories**
Enjoy interest free credit of up to 48 days* on your purchases and manage your payments as per your convenience. You can choose to pay the total outstanding amount, minimum amount due or any other amount higher than the minimum amount due *Refer MITC for more details 
Waiver of 1%* fuel surcharge every time you fill fuel using IDBI Bank Winnings RuPay Select card across all fuel stations for transactions in the range of Rs. 400 to Rs. 4000. So keep driving and enjoying with friends and family. *Maximum waiver of upto Rs. 400 per month 
Accidental Death: Cover of Rs. 10.00 lakh in case of loss of life due to accident. Permanent Disability: Cover of Rs. 10.00 lakh in case of permanent disability due to accident. Criteria: Age -18 years to 70 years Card Usage - One successful financial or non-financial transaction at any channel is done in the last 90 days prior to the incident. 
A smart man always makes the smartest move. Get away from the terminal traffic during a delayed flight to immerse in the comfort of plush airport lounges with delicious cuisine in India or abroad, absolutely free with your IDBI Bank `Winnings' Credit Card.
The airport lounge access is being provided by RuPay and is subject to change as per RuPay’s discretion from time to time without any prior notice.
IDBI Bank Winnings Credit Card offers 2 complimentary lounge visits per calendar quarter at participating Airport Lounges in India and 2 complimentary lounge visits per calendar half year at participating Airport Lounges outside India.
Per quarter period would be considered from 15th of the month i.e. Jan 15 - Apr 15, Apr 15 - Jul 15, Jul 15 - Oct 15 and Oct 15 - Jan 15.
You can use your Winnings Credit Card for booking Air/IRCTC/Bus/Hotels/ Movie tickets or enjoying Dining, Shopping, Paying Utility Bills, Recharge, Fuel and much more at over merchants and ATMS spread across India and abroad, securely with RuPay PaySecure and also earn Delight points on your transactions. 
In case of loss of credit card, report it immediately at our 24-Hour Customer Care 1800-209-4324 (Toll free) / 022-67719100 (Non-toll free). The card will be immediately blocked for all transactions to prevent card misuse. Any fraudulent transaction after reporting the loss will be covered by the Bank. 
Make IDBI Bank your family Bank by gifting your family members (only for members above 18 years) an add-on Winnings RuPay Credit Card. The add-on card enables your family members to avail all the benefits and features applicable on the primary card. The reward points earned on the add-on cards will be clubbed with those of the primary card and can be redeemed as per the higher eligibility. 
You may apply for upto 2 add-on cards for your family members.  
 |  
|  |  
| On spends of more than Rs. 90,000/- in a year  |  
| 2.5% of transaction fee or Rs. 500/-, whichever is higher  |  
| Late Payment Fess (Per occasion , Based on amount due)  | < = Rs. 500 – Nil > Rs.500 to <= Rs. 5000 – Rs.400 > Rs.5000 to < = Rs. 10000 - Rs.500 > Rs.10000 to < = Rs. 20000 - Rs.750 > Rs.20000 – Rs.950   |  
| 2.5% of over limit amount subject to minimum of Rs. 500  |  
 |  
| Minimum Amount: Rs. 3000/- Interest Rate: 13% per Annum Processing and Foreclosure Fees: Nil EMI Tenure Options: 3, 6, 9 or 12 month   |  
| Minimum Amount: Rs. 3000/- Processing Fee: 1.5% of BT amount or Rs. 199/- whichever is higher, Normal Interest rate for EMI will apply.  |  
  * Primary card holder should be in the age bracket of 21 years to 60 years (65 years for self-employed).

The above eligibility criteria are only indicative. The Bank reserves the right to approve or decline applications for Credit Card. 
  * ID Proof: Voter ID/ Passport/ Driving License/ PAN card/ Adhaar Card
  * Residence Proof: Electricity/ Telephone Bill/ Election Card/ Passport/ Adhaar Card
  * Income Proof: Latest 3 months’ Salary Slip/ Latest 3 months Bank Statement/ Latest IT Return//Form 16

The above list is only indicative and documents required may vary on a case to case basis.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - Non Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI Bank Winnings credit card provides best in class privileges in traveling, dining & lifestyle needs. Apply for IDBI credit card now
